import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import './Header.css' export default () => { const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false); window.onscroll = function () { scrollFunction() }; function scrollFunction() { if (!menuOpen) { if (document.body.scrollTop > 130 || document.documentElement.scrollTop > 130) { document.getElementById("header").style.background = "red"; } else { document.getElementById("header").style.background = "transparent"; } } } function handleButtonClick() { if(menuOpen){ setMenuOpen(false); }else{ setMenuOpen(true); } } return (
